body.title: DickSimnel worker_listener.py: add unit tests
body.result: 12 tests: ack/started ordering, missing ticket_id, OR balance gate, HIGH-inertia escalation, poll_once routing
body.intention: I intend that the core dispatch-flow paths in DickSimnelWorkerListener are covered by unit tests so regressions are caught before deployment.
body.description:
devices/dicksimnel/worker_listener.py (192 lines) was introduced in T-dicksimnel-worker-listener but has zero test coverage. The key behaviors to verify: (1) dispatch envelope triggers ack + started + device._run_inference, (2) missing ticket_id is silently ignored, (3) OR balance at floor triggers decline + setstatus sprint instead of working, (4) halt/priority envelope sets the stop event.

**Affected files:** tests/test_dicksimnel_worker_listener.py (new), devices/dicksimnel/worker_listener.py (read-only reference)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; tests use MagicMock for bus and device dependencies — no real Postgres or IMAP needed for unit tests of this listener
**Scope boundary:** In scope: _poll_once paths, _handle_dispatch core logic, _send helper. Out of scope: integration tests, full inference flow, toolloop coverage.
**Completion criteria:** tests/test_dicksimnel_worker_listener.py exists with at least 4 tests covering the paths above. `python run test` passes (including any pre-existing failures — do not fix those, just don't add new ones).
